landing.eyebrow: Business Efficiency Assessment · Powered by AI
landing.hero_headline: Find Out How Much Time AI Could Save Your Business Every Week.
landing.hero_sub: Take the free 2-minute Business Efficiency Assessment built for GCC business owners and discover where AI can reduce manual work, speed up customer response, and free up your team's time.
landing.value_stmt: Most GCC businesses are sitting on 5–15 hours of repetitive work every week that could be streamlined. The assessment shows you where yours are.
landing.snap1_d: Where AI takes work off your team
landing.snap2_d: Reply in seconds, even after hours
landing.bn_h2: AI isn't complicated — and it isn't only for tech companies.
landing.bn_lead: For most GCC businesses, the biggest wins come from fixing everyday bottlenecks. If even one of these sounds familiar, the assessment will show you where AI can help most.
landing.dis_h2: A clear picture of your biggest AI opportunities.
landing.dis_c1_d: See where AI can take repetitive, manual work off your team's plate.
landing.dis_c2_d: Learn how to reply to customers in seconds — even outside business hours.
landing.dis_c3_d: A clear picture of where you stand today and what to do first.
landing.how_h2: Three simple steps. About two minutes.
landing.how1_d: Answer 9 quick questions about how your business runs today.
landing.how2_d: See where AI can save you time and money, with a readiness score.
landing.how3_d: Get a tailored action plan for your business — no obligation.

form.pitch_h2: Start your free Business Efficiency Assessment
form.pitch_p: Enter your details and see your results in two minutes. Built for owners and decision-makers — no technical background needed.
form.check2: A clear readiness score for your business
form.check3: A free consultation with a tailored plan
form.fc_sub: Takes 2 minutes. Your details are kept private.
form.hint: We'll only use this to share your results. No spam.
form.consent: I agree to be contacted about AI for my business.
form.note: Free · about 2 minutes · your details stay private.

faq.a1: Yes — both the assessment and the consultation are completely free, with no obligation.
faq.a2: About two minutes. It's 9 simple questions about how your business runs today.
faq.a3: None at all. It's written for business owners and managers, not IT teams.
faq.a4: Yes. Your details are kept private and used only to prepare and share your results.

closing.h2: Your competitors are already asking where AI can help.
closing.p: Find out first — it's free and takes two minutes.

assessment.reassure: Your answers are saved as you go.

q1.text: How much of your team's daily work is still done manually (paperwork, copy-paste, repetitive tasks)?

q2.text: Do you currently use software to manage customers, sales, or operations (CRM, ERP, accounting)?

q3.text: How is your business data stored today?
opts: On paper or in people's heads

q4.text: Has your team tried any AI tools (ChatGPT, automation, chatbots) for work?
opts: We use them in real workflows

q5.text: What is your biggest business bottleneck right now?
opts: Hard to find or keep good staff
We're efficient — we want an edge

q6.text: How quickly does your business respond to customer enquiries?

q7.text: Do you have someone responsible for technology or digital improvement?

q8.text: How open is your leadership to adopting new technology?

q9.text: If AI could save your team 10+ hours a week, how soon would you want to act?

results.cta_heading: Get your free AI strategy consultation

curious.name: AI Curious
curious.readout: Your business is at an early stage with AI — which means the upside is large. Most of the work that slows your team down can be simplified, and you don't need to change everything at once. The smartest move is to pick one process and automate it well.
recs: Choose one repetitive task (replies, data entry, or reporting) to automate first.
Get your business information into one organised, digital place.
Start with a tool your team already knows, so adoption is easy.
curious.pitch: You're at the perfect point to get this right. In a free 30-minute call, we'll pick the one AI project that will save you the most time first — no jargon, no pressure.

ready.name: AI Ready
ready.readout: You already have some systems in place, which means you're well-positioned to adopt AI with the right guidance. The opportunity now is to connect what you have and put AI to work on your highest-volume tasks, where it pays off fastest.
recs: Target your highest-volume task — customer responses are often the biggest win.
Connect the tools you already use so data flows automatically.
Run one focused AI project with a clear before-and-after measure.
ready.pitch: You're ready to move. In a free 30-minute call, we'll map your best first AI project and the return you can expect — practical and specific to your business.

advanced.name: AI Advanced
advanced.readout: You're ahead of most businesses in your readiness. At this stage the gains come from optimisation and strategy — finding the high-leverage moves your competitors are missing and scaling what already works.
recs: Identify the highest-leverage AI opportunities your competitors haven't taken.
Standardise and scale the AI workflows already working for you.
Build a simple 6–12 month AI roadmap tied to business outcomes.
advanced.pitch: You're ahead — let's keep it that way. In a free 30-minute call, we'll find the high-leverage AI moves that compound your advantage.

consultation.h1: Book your free AI opportunity consultation.
consultation.intro: A short, practical call to show you exactly where AI can save your business the most time and money — and what to do first. No sales pressure, no jargon.
consultation.steps_h2: Thirty focused minutes. Three clear outcomes.
consultation.s1_d: We go through your assessment results together and what they mean for your business.
consultation.s2_d: We pinpoint the automation opportunities most worth doing first for your situation.
consultation.s3_d: You leave with a simple, honest recommendation — whether you work with us or not.
consultation.booking_h2: Pick a time that suits you
consultation.booking_sub: Choose a slot below and you'll get a confirmation. Prefer to message us instead? Use the WhatsApp option underneath.
consultation.wa_note: We usually reply within a few hours.
consultation.reassure: No cost and no obligation. This is a genuine working session to help you understand your options. You're never pushed to buy anything.
consultation.wa_msg: Hello AI Ready GCC, I would like to book my free consultation.
consultation.wa_msg_named: Hello AI Ready GCC, this is {name}. I would like to book my free consultation.

thankyou.title: Thank you!
thankyou.lede: Your request has been received. One of our team will be in touch shortly to confirm your free consultation.
thankyou.reminder_wa: Please keep an eye on WhatsApp — that's usually the fastest way we'll reach you.
thankyou.reminder_email: Also check your email (including the spam folder) for our confirmation.
thankyou.micro: We look forward to speaking with you.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: AI Ready GCC ("we", "us", "our") respects your privacy. This policy explains what information we collect when you use our website and Business Efficiency Assessment, how we use it, and the choices you have. We only collect what we need to share your results and follow up about how AI could help your business.
privacy.s1_p1: When you use our assessment, you may provide:
privacy.s1_list:
• Contact details: your full name, email address, and phone number.
  • Business details: your company name, business type, and company size.
  • Assessment answers: your responses to the questions in the Business Efficiency Assessment.
privacy.s1_p2: We may also automatically collect basic technical information such as your device type and how you arrived at our site (for example, from an advertisement), to help us understand and improve our marketing.
privacy.s2_list:
• To calculate and share your AI readiness results.
  • To contact you about a free consultation and how AI could help your business.
  • To respond to your enquiries and provide the services you request.
  • To understand which businesses find our assessment useful, so we can improve it.
privacy.s2_p: We will only contact you because you asked for your results and agreed to be contacted. You can ask us to stop at any time.
privacy.s3_p: Your information is stored securely using trusted third-party business tools. We use Airtable to store submissions and Make to transfer your form data into Airtable. These providers maintain their own security measures. We restrict access to your information to people who need it to operate this service.
privacy.s4_p: We do not sell your personal information. We share it only with:
privacy.s4_list:
• Service providers who help us run this service (for example, Airtable and Make), under their respective terms.
  • Advertising platforms such as Meta (Facebook and Instagram) and Google, which may use cookies or similar technologies to measure and improve our advertising. These platforms process data under their own privacy policies.
  • Authorities, if required by law.
privacy.s5_p: We may run advertisements on Meta and other platforms. These platforms may place cookies or tracking pixels to measure ad performance and show relevant ads. You can manage cookies through your browser settings and your ad preferences within each platform.
privacy.s6_h: 6. How long we keep your information
privacy.s6_p: We keep your information only for as long as needed to provide our services and follow up with you, after which it is deleted or anonymised. You may ask us to delete your information sooner.
privacy.s7_p: You may request to access, correct, or delete the personal information we hold about you, and you may withdraw your consent to be contacted at any time. To make a request, contact us using the details below.
privacy.s8_p: Our service is intended for business owners and professionals. It is not directed at anyone under 18, and we do not knowingly collect information from children.
privacy.s9_p: We may update this policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with a revised "last updated" date.
privacy.s10_p1: If you have any questions about this policy or your information, please contact:
